summary: Automation Studio now supports governed local live file-drop and artifact-backed extract movement through a scoped MinIO storage adapter. Live runs require ACTIVE status, confirmLiveRun, idempotency, and activity locks; storage copy verifies tenant/workspace object-key prefixes, size, SHA-256, and CSV-compatible content type before recording redacted artifact/checksum run history. DATA_EXTENSION extracts still fail closed pending a provider handoff and target evidence.
